description: Voice emotion detection as primary fallback when no EEG device is connected. Upgrades audio model to emotion2vec+ (9-class, 80%+ accuracy), wires voice as automatic no-EEG fallback across Dashboard and Emotion Lab, integrates MultimodalEmotionFusion, and surfaces voice-derived emotions in the intervention engine.

userStories.title: Add emotion2vec+ to ML backend requirements
userStories.description: As a developer, I need funasr + emotion2vec_plus_base installed in the ML backend so voice emotion uses a 9-class SOTA model instead of 3-class LightGBM.
acceptanceCriteria: Add 'funasr>=1.1.0' and 'modelscope>=1.9.0' to ml/requirements.deploy.txt
Add 'funasr>=1.1.0' and 'modelscope>=1.9.0' to ml/requirements.txt
Add model cache directory ml/models/saved/voice/ with .gitkeep
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: emotion2vec_plus_base from iic/emotion2vec_plus_base on ModelScope. Downloads on first use to ml/models/saved/voice/. funasr is the official inference library from Alibaba DAMO.

userStories.title: Create VoiceEmotionModel class wrapping emotion2vec+
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a VoiceEmotionModel class that wraps emotion2vec+ and returns output in the same format as EEG EmotionClassifier so both can be fused.
acceptanceCriteria: Create ml/models/voice_emotion_model.py with VoiceEmotionModel class
load() method: loads iic/emotion2vec_plus_base via funasr AutoModel, saves to ml/models/saved/voice/
predict(audio_bytes: bytes, sample_rate: int) -> dict method
Output: {emotion, probabilities: {happy,sad,angry,fear,surprise,neutral}, valence, arousal, confidence, model_type: 'voice_emotion2vec'}
Map emotion2vec 9-class: disgusted->angry, other->neutral, unknown->neutral
valence = (happy+surprise)*0.5 - (sad+angry+fear)*0.5, clipped to [-1,1]
arousal = (angry+fear+surprise)*0.6 + happy*0.3, clipped to [0,1]
Falls back to existing audio_emotion_lgbm.pkl if funasr import fails
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Fallback to MFCC LightGBM is critical for Railway deploy where model download may fail. Reuse feature extraction from ml/models/audio_emotion_model.py.

userStories.title: Upgrade POST /voice-watch/analyze and add cache endpoints
userStories.description: As a user, I want voice emotion to return 6-class output with valence/arousal matching EEG format, and a cache so EEG fusion can incorporate recent voice readings.
acceptanceCriteria: In ml/api/routes/voice_watch.py, replace audio_emotion_lgbm with VoiceEmotionModel instance
POST /voice-watch/analyze returns: {emotion, probabilities: 6-class, valence, arousal, confidence, model_type, fusion: {voice_weight, watch_weight}}
Watch biometric fusion unchanged: 60% voice + 40% watch heuristics when watch data present
Add POST /voice-watch/cache: body {user_id, emotion_result} stores result in memory dict with 5-min TTL
Add GET /voice-watch/latest/{user_id}: returns last cached result or null
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: In-memory dict cache keyed by user_id. TTL enforced by checking stored timestamp.

userStories.title: Create useVoiceEmotion shared hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I need a shared hook for voice recording so Dashboard and Emotion Lab don't duplicate MediaRecorder logic.
acceptanceCriteria: Create client/src/hooks/use-voice-emotion.ts
Exports: { isRecording, emotion, probabilities, valence, arousal, confidence, error, startRecording, lastUpdated }
startRecording(): records 7 seconds via MediaRecorder, calls POST /voice-watch/analyze, updates state
Encodes audio as base64, sends with latest biometrics from useHealthSync hook
After successful result, POSTs to POST /voice-watch/cache with user_id='default'
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Refactor recording logic from client/src/components/voice-watch-analyzer.tsx into this hook. VoiceWatchAnalyzer should then use this hook internally.

userStories.title: Wire VoiceWatchAnalyzer into Emotion Lab as no-EEG fallback
userStories.description: As a user, when no EEG headset is connected, I want a voice emotion panel to appear automatically in Emotion Lab so I can still get emotion readings.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/pages/emotion-lab.tsx, import VoiceWatchAnalyzer from '@/components/voice-watch-analyzer'
When deviceState !== 'streaming': render amber banner 'No EEG device — using voice analysis' + VoiceWatchAnalyzer below it
When deviceState === 'streaming': hide VoiceWatchAnalyzer entirely
VoiceWatchAnalyzer result updates the emotion display in the page via useVoiceEmotion hook
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Add voice emotion Detect button and card to Dashboard
userStories.description: As a user, I want a Detect Emotion button on the Dashboard when no EEG is connected so I can get a voice-derived brain state reading.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/pages/dashboard.tsx, import useVoiceEmotion hook
When !isStreaming: show 'Detect Emotion' button (uses Mic icon) that calls startRecording()
During recording: button shows spinner + 'Listening 7s...'
After result: show Voice Brain State card with emotion label, valence bar, arousal bar, amber 'Voice Analysis' badge
When isStreaming: hide entire voice section
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Wire MultimodalEmotionFusion into WebSocket /analyze-eeg path
userStories.description: As a user, I want EEG emotion analysis to automatically incorporate Apple Health biometrics and voice readings so accuracy improves from 74% to 85%+.
acceptanceCriteria: In ml/api/routes.py WebSocket handler, after predict_emotion() call, call multimodal_fusion.fuse(eeg_result, bio) with latest cached biometrics
When biometric_confidence > 0.5: override stress_index, valence, arousal, emotion in frame with fused values
Frame includes 'fusion_active': true and 'signal_count': N when fusion applied
If voice cache has result < 5min old for user: include it as additional signal in fusion
Frame includes 'voice_emotion': {emotion, confidence} key when voice was fused
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: MultimodalEmotionFusion.fuse() already exists in ml/models/multimodal_emotion_fusion.py — just call it after EEG prediction and merge results into WebSocket frame.

userStories.title: Add voice emotion trigger to intervention engine
userStories.description: As a user, I want breathing and music interventions to fire based on voice emotion when no EEG is available.
acceptanceCriteria: In ml/api/routes/interventions.py, POST /interventions/check accepts optional voice_emotion: {emotion, stress_index, valence} in body
When voice_emotion.stress_index > 0.6 OR emotion in ['angry','fear']: trigger breathing intervention (same 10-min cooldown)
When voice_emotion.emotion == 'sad' AND valence < -0.3: trigger music_calm intervention
In client/src/components/InterventionBanner.tsx (or equivalent), after voice analysis result: POST /interventions/check with voice_emotion payload
Typecheck passes
userStories.notes: Existing per-user cooldown (10 min) still applies. This adds voice as trigger source alongside EEG.

userStories.title: Add Signal Source badge to Brain Monitor page
userStories.description: As a user, I want a clear label showing whether my emotion reading came from EEG, voice, or Apple Health so I understand the confidence level.
acceptanceCriteria: In client/src/pages/brain-monitor.tsx, add Signal Source badge below current emotion display
Badge: 'EEG Live' green when streaming, 'Voice Analysis' amber when voice fallback, 'Health Estimate' blue when Apple Health only
When frame has fusion_active=true: badge shows 'EEG + Biometrics' purple
When frame has voice_emotion key: badge shows 'EEG + Voice' indigo
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using dev-browser skill

userStories.title: Update STATUS.md and PRODUCT.md for voice emotion sprint
userStories.description: As a developer, STATUS.md and PRODUCT.md should reflect the new voice emotion pipeline.
acceptanceCriteria: STATUS.md: add Phase 6 Voice Emotion Fallback section with US-001 to US-009 all marked [x]
STATUS.md: ML Backend section notes emotion2vec+ (iic/emotion2vec_plus_base) as voice model
PRODUCT.md Honest Assessment: voice fallback ~70-80% (voice only), 85-90% (EEG + biometrics fused)
Typecheck passes
